description_long: This is a tall, rectangular chest of drawers constructed from light-colored wood, featuring a natural wood grain pattern across all visible surfaces. The front face displays three spacious drawers, each with a circular recessed pull handle, providing a minimalist and functional aesthetic. The sides and back are plain, with no visible hardware or decorative elements, emphasizing a clean and modern design. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing small objects or decor. The drawers are likely to be made of the same wood as the exterior, with internal compartments for storage. The overall build suggests a sturdy, practical piece of furniture suitable for urban environments such as offices, apartments, or garages.
description: A tall, light wood chest of drawers with three recessed pull drawers and a minimalist, modern design. The surface is smooth with visible wood grain and no decorative embellishments.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with circular recessed pull handles and visible wood grain.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, flat wooden panel with subtle vertical grain and no hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat wooden panel with consistent grain and no openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain wooden panel and no visible hardware.
